input.content:
How do I fix the CUDA device ordering?
It keeps flipping.

extract_key_point.expected: How do I fix the CUDA device ordering?

input.content: The fix is to set CUDA_DEVICE_ORDER=PCI_BUS_ID. That aligns indices with nvidia-smi.

extract_key_point.expected: The fix is to set CUDA_DEVICE_ORDER=PCI_BUS_ID

input.content:
## Header
* bullet point that is long enough to extract
More text follows here.

extract_key_point.expected: bullet point that is long enough to extract

input.content:
[TOOL OUTPUT]
Function: parse_config(path) -> dict
body text

[TOOL OUTPUT]
The ARCHITECTURE overview follows
stuff

[TOOL RESULT]
SKELETON VIEW
File: core/engine.py
more

[TOOL OUTPUT]
just some plain first line that is quite long and should be cut to eighty characters exactly here
second
